season_weather_overlays_bank_v1.description: Climate-aware styling overlays for practical adaptation without sacrificing polish.

summer_heat: The silhouette feels breathable for summer.
Lightweight fabrics will keep this comfortable.
Keeping the palette lighter helps in heat.
This works well for warmer days.
The structure is clean without trapping heat.
monsoon: Keep the fabrics structured so they don’t collapse in humidity.
A closed shoe might work better in rain.
A darker base can handle weather shifts better.
Avoid overly delicate fabrics for this setting.
A practical layer would help here.
winter_layering: Layering can add structure and depth here.
A longer outer layer would create clean vertical lines.
Texture mixing works beautifully in winter.
A tonal coat would elevate this instantly.
Keep the base clean and let the layer do the work.
mild_weather: This works perfectly for transitional weather.
A light layer will make it adaptable.
This silhouette handles mild weather well.
Keeping it flexible makes sense here.
